(1) इन िविनयमᲂ का नाम भारतीय पुिलस सेवा (संवगᭅ पद सं᭎या का िनयतन) ि᳇तीय संशोधन िविनयमावली, 2017 कहा जा सकेगा (2) ये िविनयम शासकᳱय राजपᮢ मᱶ इनके ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख को ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे 2. भारतीय पुिलस सेवा (संवगᭅ पद सं᭎या का िनयतन) िविनयमावली, 1955 कᳱ अनुसूची मᱶ “गु जरात” शीषᭅक तथा उससे संबंिधत ᮧिवि᳥यᲂ के िलए िन᭥निलिखत ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकया जाएगा, ना मत:- "गुजरात रा᭔य सरकार के अं तगᭅत वᳯर᳧ Ჽूटी पद 114 महािनदेशक पुिलस, गुजरात 1 महािनदेशक, नागᳯरक रᭃा एवं कमांडᱶट जनरल होम गाडᭅ, गुजरात रा᭔य 1 -- 1 of 18 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] िनदेशक, ᳥᮪ाचार रोधी ᭣यूरो, गुजरात रा᭔य, अहमदाबाद डीसीपी (अपराध) सूरत 1 पुिलस अधीᭃक -(पूवᭅ) गांधीधाम 1 डीसीपी (यातायात) वडोदरा शहर 1 1. कु ल वᳯर᳧ कतᭅ᳞ पद 114 2. कᱶᮤ ीय ᮧितिनयु िᲦ ᳯरजवᭅ ऊपर आइटम 1 के 40% से अिधक न हो 45 3. रा᭔य ᮧितिनयु िᲦ ᳯरजवᭅ आइटम ऊपर 1 के 25% से अिधक न हो 28 4. ऊपर 1 आइटम के 3.5% से अनिधक ᳯरजवᭅ ᮧिशᭃण 03 5. छुᲵी ᳯरजवᭅ और जूिनयर पो᭭ ट ᳯरजवᭅ आइटम ऊपर 1 के 16.5% से अिधक नहᱭ 18 6. भारतीय पु िलस से वा (भतᱮ) िनयम, 1954 के िनयम 9 के अधीन भरे जाने वाले पद ऊपर के मद 1, 2, 3 एवं 4 के 33 1/3% से अिधक नहᱭ 63 7. सीधी भतᱮ से भरने के िलए पद (आइटम 1 + 2 + 3 + 4 + 5-6) 145 कुल ᮧािधकृत पदसं᭎या 208" [फ़ा. नं 11052/02/2016-अ.भा.से.-II (क)] 16.07.82 15 433 18.12.2004 7 706 28.08.82 16 192अ 24.03.2009 8 162 14.03.87 17 231अ 30.03.2010 9 446 04.06.88 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st February, 2017 G.S.R. 81(E).– In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Police Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Gujarat, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Police Service (Fixation of cadre Strength) Second Amendment Regulations, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Gujarat” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “GUJARAT Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 114 Director General of Police, Gujarat 1 Director General, Civil Defence & Commandant General Home Guards, Gujarat State 1 -- 7 of 18 -- 8 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Director, Anti-Corruption Bureau, Gujarat State, Ahmedabad City 1 Commissioner of Police- Ahmedabad City 1 Addl. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Police Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, in schedule II,– (a) In Part A relating to posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Gujarat” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:– “GUJARAT Director General of Police, Gujarat Level 17 in the pay matrix Director General, Civil Defense & Commandant General Home Guards, Gujarat State Level 16 in the pay matrix Director, Anti-Corruption Bureau, Gujarat State, Ahmedabad City Level 16 in the pay matrix Commissioner of Police- Ahmedabad City Level 15 in the pay matrix Addl. Director General of Police- CID (Crime & Railways) Level 15 in the pay matrix Addl.
